summary: deepseek: h2_end_stream=2 fix CONFIRMED (no ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR). SSE stream terminated by APF, UI shows generic network error. BLOCK_ONLY. gemini3: page load NOT blocked (path=/ GET passes through). StreamGenerate POST blocked with 400 Bad Request. UI shows no error/warning. BLOCK_ONLY.

completion.response_body: Failed to load response data: No data found for resource with given identifier
completion.description: SSE stream terminated by APF before any events delivered

create.description: Session creation also failed — APF intercepted

services.ui_response: 네트워크를 확인하고 다시 시도하세요 (generic network error)
services.notes: h2_end_stream=2 successfully resolved ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Stream is now properly terminated. However, no custom warning text is displayed — only generic network error.

page_load.description: Page loaded fully with chat interface. path=/ rule does NOT block GET page load (expected behavior).

stream_generate.description: APF blocked StreamGenerate with 400 Bad Request. Response is JSON error object.

services.ui_response: No visible error or warning. Welcome screen still displayed. Message text remains in input field. Suggestion buttons still visible.
services.notes: Gemini frontend silently swallowed the 400 error. No chat thread created. No user-facing error message or dialog. The APF block is effective but invisible to the user.
